query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gameTransactions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `memberId` int NOT NULL,
  `classId` int NOT NULL,
  `pfAmount` int NOT NULL,
  `transactionType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `missionId` int,
  `description` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gameMissions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `weekNumber` int NOT NULL,
  `classId` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `pharmacologyTopic` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `clinicalCase` json NOT NULL,
  `decisions` json NOT NULL,
  `difficulty` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `pfReward` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `hints` json NOT NULL,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gameMissions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

  `pfReward` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,

  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
